TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tuo-ma-se.Luo-puo-te'. Ma-e-sa'-seśČėť¶¨śĖĮ¬∑ÁĺÖšľĮÁČĻ¬∑ť¶¨ÁąĺŤĖ©śĖĮ = nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ pilecuhan ni Ma-e-sa'-se siidaay nu luma'an. ci ama nida ci Dan-ni-e u ce-sye-cia, pabaliway misulit ci Ta-wi. Siw-muo atu zan-ya-ke'. Lu-suo a cabay. iluma' tu ci Ma-e-sa'-se micudad, katukuh tu caypic walsip mihcaan maala tu nipicuda tu Cin-ciw tabakiay a cadudadan Yesu syeyun. yadah ku nananamen tu cudadan, sakay tida i nikasasetsetan, La-tin-wen atu Si-la-wen a cudadan makaala tu tu kawlah. u tada ni nanaman nida u suyei. . caypic siwcay mihcaan maala nida ku souse a hedekan tu cudadan, tawya nu tusaay a mihcaan mala Ye-su-hua cudadan nu yunse. caypic siwpic mihcaan pataydan ci nida i Sen-kun-hua a niyaduan mala buksi. malalid ni ama nida ci Wi-len.Ke-de-wen a sadadatengan , mikawaw misumad tu nu syakay a kawawan, ci Ma-e-sa-se tuyni a sasakamuen sapihantayay ku nida a kalaluman nu kawawan, mibelihay ci amaan nida, itini i caypic siwwal mihcaan caay pangangani nida ku sapatahekal tu cudadan, ngangan nu cudad han " sakay lalid nu sapisumad a tademawan tu nakamuan, misakamu tu ci Ke-de-wen a nakamuan. itida i caywal seplu mihcaan tayda midang i O-cuo tahekal aca ku " tademaw a cudadan". 1791 "šļļŚŹ£ŤęĖ" Ôľé i caywal sepsip mihcaan mikikun, tatulu ku wawa nida. caywal seplim mihcaan mala Ingkuo sayaway nu cence cinci sye a saydan, itida pasubana' i Dun-in-tu' kusi syeyun. mangaay ku micudaday nida miawaw ci nidaan u " tademaw" Ma-e-sa-se. . ci nida atu duma a cinci tase ci Li-cia-tu itini i syesu atu kunkun' cinci yadah ku sakacaay ka sasulul, nika u nuheni tatusa sakay cudadan sa caay kasasulul, sakay cudadan anikacaay ka sasululan nika u masasungaayay ku nuheni tatusa, nika caayan ka sasulul tu sakay In-kuo lalawpesan tu Ku-wu-fa, ci Ma-e-sa-se sakay liwmahan a musakamu " u lala' nipabeli nu paudipay" , nialaan tu talakaway nu damsuan a talakaway u nisuyan pakalawlaw tu silala'ay u siidaay sa, ci Li-cia-tu pakayda ci nida i Sing-sin cepencia atu mikuliay sakamusa " nisuyan a lala' u sakalihalay a satekesay, sisa caay pacumud tu namaka hekalay a tuudan misatadas tu lala' u sanai'ay kupucan sa. nu ayawan caywal lulu mihcaan, kaisa ci Ma-e-sa-se tu nikulitan a tademaw, mangucih ci nida. nina ngucih sizicuan kapah tu, u malakapahay a adihen nutaw. i labu nu kawilian nu laway idaw ku pela', utiih musakamu. hina adih kita tu lumaay nu heni. 1833ŚĻīšĽ•ŚČć, . caywal lusiw mihcaan, masinzumiyu ci nida mapatay i kakadabuan nu luma nida, tademen i Ing-ke-lan a Pa-se-siw-taw-yen. 1834ŚĻī, . TincuciwŚ§©šłĽśēô tincuciw a sakaudip a syece kaisa tu lilun ni Ma-e-se, micili ci nidaan u sabaw pitu a secian Wi-ni-se caay kalecad nu la'cusay a nibelihan tu nutaw a cudadan. "tincuciw a cudad sulit sa, u sapaayaw tu tademawan a tinengan nai' ku'puc sa, misaahebal tu tademaw tada macunus a sakatalawan, u sakapahay a sapidem tu kawawan u sapikilimaw tu kapahay a saykay atu sapisakakawaw nu waywayan, sakapahay a sakay padekauwan, micudah tu sakay tademawan atu kiwkayan a nipikiwyikuan", sisa, tinsukiw mihantay miput tu sasalecuhan atu mikuwan tu tademaw, uyni atu Ma-e-se a nadatengan malecad. . masakaputay nu tademaw šļļś¨äÁĶĄÁĻĒ masakaputay nu mulecuhay a tademaw mihantay tu sihu tu nipikuwan tu mangalaya mulecuhay nu tataynaan, saan tada mikuwan tu tataynaan a sapilecuhan a kawawan. . lalidŚĹĪťüŅ itin i Tun-in-du' kuse syeyun, ci Ma-e-sa-se idaw ku nipatahekalan tu ka ngalayan tu sakacaay kalecad nu lilunan, tada yadah tu sa, mihantay tu sapabeli tu nu udip tu ngalay a Say-yi-tin-li. itawya u caay kaw masahicahicaay a li-lun, alaw u ta-siw-tiaw a masilacay tu sakaudip nu lilun a sayaway, misakasikaday ci nidaan, sakaudip a syeciw ci Ye-han. Mei-na-de. Kay-n-se patalabuen nida kuyni a nidatengan tu sasulitan. . yu mahida tada yadah tu ku nilecuhan mikapah tu sakaudip, a yadah ku mikuliay sa. sisa, ci Ma-e-sa-se sipakayda i baluhay nilecuhan, anu yadah ku nipilecuhan tu tademaw taneng micunus tu sakaudip sa, miwada' tu sakay tademawan tu sakasilaculan. nina nidatengan milalid tu sakaudip a tademaw ci Ta-wi. Li-cia-tu. . #%E7%94%9F%E5%B9%B3
S.PHON: = tuo-ma-s…ô.r~…ĺuo-puo-t…ô Ē~ °. ma-…ô-sa Ē~ °-s…ô************ = nikaudip** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni ma-…ô-sa Ē~ °-s…ô siidaaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. ¶i ama nida ¶i dan-ni-…ô u ¶…ô-sj…ô- ¶ia, pabar~…ĺiwaj misur~…ĺit ¶i ta-wi. siw-muo atu zan-ja-k…ô Ē~ °. r~…ĺu-suo a ¶abaj. ir~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu ¶i ma-…ô-sa Ē~ °-s…ô mi ¶udad, katukuńß tu ¶ajpi ¶ war~…ĺsip mińß ¶aan maar~…ĺa tu nipi ¶uda tu ¶in- ¶iw tabakiaj a ¶adudadan j…ôsu sj…ôun. jadańß ku nananam…ôn tu ¶udadan, sakaj tida i nikasas…ôts…ôtan, r~…ĺa-tin-w…ôn atu si-r~…ĺa-w…ôn a ¶udadan makaar~…ĺa tu tu kawr~…ĺańß. u tada ni nanaman nida u suj…ôi. . ¶ajpi ¶ siw ¶aj mińß ¶aan maar~…ĺa nida ku sous…ô a ńß…ôd…ôkan tu ¶udadan, tawja nu tusaaj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa j…ô-su-ńßua ¶udadan nu juns…ô. ¶ajpi ¶ siwpi ¶ mińß ¶aan patajdan ¶i nida i s…ôn-kun-ńßua a nijaduan mar~…ĺa buksi. mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ni ama nida ¶i wi-r~…ĺ…ôn.k…ô-d…ô-w…ôn a sadadat…ôŇčan , mikawaw misumad tu nu sjakaj a kawawan, ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô tujni a sasakamu…ôn sapińßantajaj ku nida a kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman nu kawawan, mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj ¶i amaan nida, itini i ¶ajpi ¶ siwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan ¶aaj paŇčaŇčani nida ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶udadan, ŇčaŇčan nu ¶udad ńßan " sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid nu sapisumad a tad…ômawan tu nakamuan, misakamu tu ¶i k…ô-d…ô-w…ôn a nakamuan. itida i ¶ajwar~…ĺ s…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan tajda midaŇč i o- ¶uo tańß…ôkar~…ĺ a ¶a ku " tad…ômaw a ¶udadan". **** "***" * i ¶ajwar~…ĺ s…ôpsip mińß ¶aan mikikun, tatur~…ĺu ku wawa nida. ¶ajwar~…ĺ s…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa iŇčkuo sajawaj nu ¶…ôn ¶…ô ¶in ¶i sj…ô a sajdan, itida pasubana Ē~ ° i dun-in-tu Ē~ ° kusi sj…ôun. maŇčaaj ku mi ¶udadaj nida miawaw ¶i nidaan u " tad…ômaw" ma-…ô-sa-s…ô. . ¶i nida atu duma a ¶in ¶i tas…ô ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶ia-tu itini i sj…ôsu atu kunkun Ē~ ° ¶in ¶i jadańß ku saka ¶aaj ka sasur~…ĺur~…ĺ, nika u nuńß…ôni tatusa sakaj ¶udadan sa ¶aaj kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ, sakaj ¶udadan anika ¶aaj ka sasur~…ĺur~…ĺan nika u masasuŇčaajaj ku nuńß…ôni tatusa, nika ¶aajan ka sasur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu sakaj in-kuo r~…ĺar~…ĺawp…ôsan tu ku-wu-fa, ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô sakaj r~…ĺiwmańßan a musakamu " u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu paudipaj" , niar~…ĺaan tu tar~…ĺakawaj nu damsuan a tar~…ĺakawaj u nisujan pakar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu sir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj u siidaaj sa, ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶ia-tu pakajda ¶i nida i siŇč-sin ¶…ôp…ôn ¶ia atu mikur~…ĺiaj sakamusa " nisujan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a sat…ôk…ôsaj, sisa ¶aaj pa ¶umud tu namaka ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tuudan misatadas tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u sanai Ē~ °aj kupu ¶an sa. nu ajawan ¶ajwar~…ĺ r~…ĺur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, kaisa ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô tu nikur~…ĺitan a tad…ômaw, maŇču ¶ińß ¶i nida. nina Ňču ¶ińß sizi ¶uan kapańß tu, u mar~…ĺakapańßaj a adińß…ôn nutaw. i r~…ĺabu nu kawir~…ĺian nu r~…ĺawaj idaw ku p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °, utiińß musakamu. ńßina adińß kita tu r~…ĺumaaj nu ńß…ôni. *******, . ¶ajwar~…ĺ r~…ĺusiw mińß ¶aan, masinzumiju ¶i nida mapataj i kakadabuan nu r~…ĺuma nida, tad…ôm…ôn i iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan a pa-s…ô-siw-taw-j…ôn. *****, . tin ¶u ¶iw*** tin ¶u ¶iw a sakaudip a sj…ô ¶…ô kaisa tu r~…ĺir~…ĺun ni ma-…ô-s…ô, mi ¶ir~…ĺi ¶i nidaan u sabaw pitu a s…ô ¶ian wi-ni-s…ô ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a nib…ôr~…ĺińßan tu nutaw a ¶udadan. "tin ¶u ¶iw a ¶udad sur~…ĺit sa, u sapaajaw tu tad…ômawan a tin…ôŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku Ē~ °pu ¶ sa, misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu tad…ômaw tada ma ¶unus a sakatar~…ĺawan, u sakapańßaj a sapid…ôm tu kawawan u sapikir~…ĺimaw tu kapańßaj a sajkaj atu sapisakakawaw nu wajwajan, sakapańßaj a sakaj pad…ôkauwan, mi ¶udańß tu sakaj tad…ômawan atu kiwkajan a nipikiwjikuan", sisa, tinsukiw mińßantaj miput tu sasar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan atu mikuwan tu tad…ômaw, ujni atu ma-…ô-s…ô a nadat…ôŇčan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. . masakaputaj nu tad…ômaw **** masakaputaj nu mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßaj a tad…ômaw mińßantaj tu sińßu tu nipikuwan tu maŇčar~…ĺaja mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßaj nu tatajnaan, saan tada mikuwan tu tatajnaan a sapir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a kawawan. . r~…ĺar~…ĺid** itin i tun-in-du Ē~ ° kus…ô sj…ôun, ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô idaw ku nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu ka Ňčar~…ĺajan tu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu r~…ĺir~…ĺunan, tada jadańß tu sa, mińßantaj tu sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu nu udip tu Ňčar~…ĺaj a saj-ji-tin-r~…ĺi. itawja u ¶aaj kaw masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun, ar~…ĺaw u ta-siw-tiaw a masir~…ĺa ¶aj tu sakaudip nu r~…ĺir~…ĺun a sajawaj, misakasikadaj ¶i nidaan, sakaudip a sj…ô ¶iw ¶i j…ô-ńßan. m…ôi-na-d…ô. kaj-n-s…ô patar~…ĺabu…ôn nida kujni a nidat…ôŇčan tu sasur~…ĺitan. . ju mańßida tada jadańß tu ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan mikapańß tu sakaudip, a jadańß ku mikur~…ĺiaj sa. sisa, ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô sipakajda i bar~…ĺuńßaj nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, anu jadańß ku nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč mi ¶unus tu sakaudip sa, miwada Ē~ ° tu sakaj tad…ômawan tu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. nina nidat…ôŇčan mir~…ĺar~…ĺid tu sakaudip a tad…ômaw ¶i ta-wi. r~…ĺi- ¶ia-tu. . #%…ô*%**%*f%…ô*%b*%b*
S.FORM: = Tuo-ma-se.Luo-puo-te'. Ma-e-sa'-seśČėť¶¨śĖĮ¬∑ÁĺÖšľĮÁČĻ¬∑ť¶¨ÁąĺŤĖ©śĖĮ = nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ pilecuhan ni Ma-e-sa'-se siidaay nu luma'an. ci ama nida ci Dan-ni-e u ce-sye-cia, pabaliway misulit ci Ta-wi. Siw-muo atu zan-ya-ke'. Lu-suo a cabay. iluma' tu ci Ma-e-sa'-se micudad, katukuh tu caypic walsip mihcaan maala tu nipicuda tu Cin-ciw tabakiay a cadudadan Yesu syeyun. yadah ku nananamen tu cudadan, sakay tida i nikasasetsetan, La-tin-wen atu Si-la-wen a cudadan makaala tu tu kawlah. u tada ni nanaman nida u suyei. . caypic siwcay mihcaan maala nida ku souse a hedekan tu cudadan, tawya nu tusaay a mihcaan mala Ye-su-hua cudadan nu yunse. caypic siwpic mihcaan pataydan ci nida i Sen-kun-hua a niyaduan mala buksi. malalid ni ama nida ci Wi-len.Ke-de-wen a sadadatengan , mikawaw misumad tu nu syakay a kawawan, ci Ma-e-sa-se tuyni a sasakamuen sapihantayay ku nida a kalaluman nu kawawan, mibelihay ci amaan nida, itini i caypic siwwal mihcaan caay pangangani nida ku sapatahekal tu cudadan, ngangan nu cudad han " sakay lalid nu sapisumad a tademawan tu nakamuan, misakamu tu ci Ke-de-wen a nakamuan. itida i caywal seplu mihcaan tayda midang i O-cuo tahekal aca ku " tademaw a cudadan". 1791 "šļļŚŹ£ŤęĖ" Ôľé i caywal sepsip mihcaan mikikun, tatulu ku wawa nida. caywal seplim mihcaan mala Ingkuo sayaway nu cence cinci sye a saydan, itida pasubana' i Dun-in-tu' kusi syeyun. mangaay ku micudaday nida miawaw ci nidaan u " tademaw" Ma-e-sa-se. . ci nida atu duma a cinci tase ci Li-cia-tu itini i syesu atu kunkun' cinci yadah ku sakacaay ka sasulul, nika u nuheni tatusa sakay cudadan sa caay kasasulul, sakay cudadan anikacaay ka sasululan nika u masasungaayay ku nuheni tatusa, nika caayan ka sasulul tu sakay In-kuo lalawpesan tu Ku-wu-fa, ci Ma-e-sa-se sakay liwmahan a musakamu " u lala' nipabeli nu paudipay" , nialaan tu talakaway nu damsuan a talakaway u nisuyan pakalawlaw tu silala'ay u siidaay sa, ci Li-cia-tu pakayda ci nida i Sing-sin cepencia atu mikuliay sakamusa " nisuyan a lala' u sakalihalay a satekesay, sisa caay pacumud tu namaka hekalay a tuudan misatadas tu lala' u sanai'ay kupucan sa. nu ayawan caywal lulu mihcaan, kaisa ci Ma-e-sa-se tu nikulitan a tademaw, mangucih ci nida. nina ngucih sizicuan kapah tu, u malakapahay a adihen nutaw. i labu nu kawilian nu laway idaw ku pela', utiih musakamu. hina adih kita tu lumaay nu heni. 1833ŚĻīšĽ•ŚČć, . caywal lusiw mihcaan, masinzumiyu ci nida mapatay i kakadabuan nu luma nida, tademen i Ing-ke-lan a Pa-se-siw-taw-yen. 1834ŚĻī, . TincuciwŚ§©šłĽśēô tincuciw a sakaudip a syece kaisa tu lilun ni Ma-e-se, micili ci nidaan u sabaw pitu a secian Wi-ni-se caay kalecad nu la'cusay a nibelihan tu nutaw a cudadan. "tincuciw a cudad sulit sa, u sapaayaw tu tademawan a tinengan nai' ku'puc sa, misaahebal tu tademaw tada macunus a sakatalawan, u sakapahay a sapidem tu kawawan u sapikilimaw tu kapahay a saykay atu sapisakakawaw nu waywayan, sakapahay a sakay padekauwan, micudah tu sakay tademawan atu kiwkayan a nipikiwyikuan", sisa, tinsukiw mihantay miput tu sasalecuhan atu mikuwan tu tademaw, uyni atu Ma-e-se a nadatengan malecad. . masakaputay nu tademaw šļļś¨äÁĶĄÁĻĒ masakaputay nu mulecuhay a tademaw mihantay tu sihu tu nipikuwan tu mangalaya mulecuhay nu tataynaan, saan tada mikuwan tu tataynaan a sapilecuhan a kawawan. . lalidŚĹĪťüŅ itin i Tun-in-du' kuse syeyun, ci Ma-e-sa-se idaw ku nipatahekalan tu ka ngalayan tu sakacaay kalecad nu lilunan, tada yadah tu sa, mihantay tu sapabeli tu nu udip tu ngalay a Say-yi-tin-li. itawya u caay kaw masahicahicaay a li-lun, alaw u ta-siw-tiaw a masilacay tu sakaudip nu lilun a sayaway, misakasikaday ci nidaan, sakaudip a syeciw ci Ye-han. Mei-na-de. Kay-n-se patalabuen nida kuyni a nidatengan tu sasulitan. . yu mahida tada yadah tu ku nilecuhan mikapah tu sakaudip, a yadah ku mikuliay sa. sisa, ci Ma-e-sa-se sipakayda i baluhay nilecuhan, anu yadah ku nipilecuhan tu tademaw taneng micunus tu sakaudip sa, miwada' tu sakay tademawan tu sakasilaculan. nina nidatengan milalid tu sakaudip a tademaw ci Ta-wi. Li-cia-tu. . #%E7%94%9F%E5%B9%B3

ku nida a kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman nu kawawan, mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj ¶i amaan nida, itini i ¶ajpi ¶ siwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan ¶aaj paŇčaŇčani nida ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶udadan, ŇčaŇčan nu ¶udad ńßan " sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid nu sapisumad a tad…ômawan tu nakamuan, misakamu tu ¶i k…ô-d…ô-w…ôn a nakamuan. itida i ¶ajwar~…ĺ s…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan tajda midaŇč i o- ¶uo tańß…ôkar~…ĺ a ¶a ku " tad…ômaw a ¶udadan". **** "***" * i ¶ajwar~…ĺ s…ôpsip mińß ¶aan mikikun, tatur~…ĺu ku wawa nida. ¶ajwar~…ĺ s…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa iŇčkuo sajawaj nu ¶…ôn ¶…ô ¶in ¶i sj…ô a sajdan, itida pasubana Ē~ ° i dun-in-tu Ē~ ° kusi sj…ôun. maŇčaaj ku mi ¶udadaj nida miawaw ¶i nidaan u " tad…ômaw" ma-…ô-sa-s…ô. . ¶i nida atu duma a ¶in ¶i tas…ô ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶ia-tu itini i sj…ôsu atu kunkun Ē~ ° ¶in ¶i jadańß ku saka ¶aaj ka sasur~…ĺur~…ĺ, nika u nuńß…ôni tatusa sakaj ¶udadan sa ¶aaj kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ, sakaj ¶udadan anika ¶aaj ka sasur~…ĺur~…ĺan nika u masasuŇčaajaj ku nuńß…ôni tatusa, nika ¶aajan ka sasur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu sakaj in-kuo r~…ĺar~…ĺawp…ôsan tu ku-wu-fa, ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô sakaj r~…ĺiwmańßan a musakamu " u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu paudipaj" , niar~…ĺaan tu tar~…ĺakawaj nu damsuan a tar~…ĺakawaj u nisujan pakar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu sir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj u siidaaj sa, ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶ia-tu pakajda ¶i nida i siŇč-sin ¶…ôp…ôn ¶ia atu mikur~…ĺiaj sakamusa " nisujan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a sat…ôk…ôsaj, sisa ¶aaj pa ¶umud tu namaka ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tuudan misatadas tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u sanai Ē~ °aj kupu ¶an sa. nu ajawan ¶ajwar~…ĺ r~…ĺur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, kaisa ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô tu nikur~…ĺitan a tad…ômaw, maŇču ¶ińß ¶i nida. nina Ňču ¶ińß sizi ¶uan kapańß tu, u mar~…ĺakapańßaj a adińß…ôn nutaw. i r~…ĺabu nu kawir~…ĺian nu r~…ĺawaj idaw ku p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °, utiińß musakamu. ńßina adińß kita tu r~…ĺumaaj nu ńß…ôni. *******, . ¶ajwar~…ĺ r~…ĺusiw mińß ¶aan, masinzumiju ¶i nida mapataj i kakadabuan nu r~…ĺuma nida, tad…ôm…ôn i iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan a pa-s…ô-siw-taw-j…ôn. *****, . tin ¶u ¶iw*** tin ¶u ¶iw a sakaudip a sj…ô ¶…ô kaisa tu r~…ĺir~…ĺun ni ma-…ô-s…ô, mi ¶ir~…ĺi ¶i nidaan u sabaw pitu a s…ô ¶ian wi-ni-s…ô ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a nib…ôr~…ĺińßan tu nutaw a ¶udadan. "tin ¶u ¶iw a ¶udad sur~…ĺit sa, u sapaajaw tu tad…ômawan a tin…ôŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku Ē~ °pu ¶ sa, misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu tad…ômaw tada ma ¶unus a sakatar~…ĺawan, u sakapańßaj a sapid…ôm tu kawawan u sapikir~…ĺimaw tu kapańßaj a sajkaj atu sapisakakawaw nu wajwajan, sakapańßaj a sakaj pad…ôkauwan, mi ¶udańß tu sakaj tad…ômawan atu kiwkajan a nipikiwjikuan", sisa, tinsukiw mińßantaj miput tu sasar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan atu mikuwan tu tad…ômaw, ujni atu ma-…ô-s…ô a nadat…ôŇčan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. . masakaputaj nu tad…ômaw **** masakaputaj nu mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßaj a tad…ômaw mińßantaj tu sińßu tu nipikuwan tu maŇčar~…ĺaja mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßaj nu tatajnaan, saan tada mikuwan tu tatajnaan a sapir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a kawawan. . r~…ĺar~…ĺid** itin i tun-in-du Ē~ ° kus…ô sj…ôun, ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô idaw ku nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu ka Ňčar~…ĺajan tu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu r~…ĺir~…ĺunan, tada jadańß tu sa, mińßantaj tu sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu nu udip tu Ňčar~…ĺaj a saj-ji-tin-r~…ĺi. itawja u ¶aaj kaw masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun, ar~…ĺaw u ta-siw-tiaw a masir~…ĺa ¶aj tu sakaudip nu r~…ĺir~…ĺun a sajawaj, misakasikadaj ¶i nidaan, sakaudip a sj…ô ¶iw ¶i j…ô-ńßan. m…ôi-na-d…ô. kaj-n-s…ô patar~…ĺabu…ôn nida kujni a nidat…ôŇčan tu sasur~…ĺitan. . ju mańßida tada jadańß tu ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan mikapańß tu sakaudip, a jadańß ku mikur~…ĺiaj sa. sisa, ¶i ma-…ô-sa-s…ô sipakajda i bar~…ĺuńßaj nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, anu jadańß ku nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč mi ¶unus tu sakaudip sa, miwada Ē~ ° tu sakaj tad…ômawan tu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. nina nidat…ôŇčan mir~…ĺar~…ĺid tu sakaudip a tad…ômaw ¶i ta-wi. r~…ĺi- ¶ia-tu. . #%…ô*%**%*f%…ô*%b*%b*
